column1: **inPath:** |br| Path where initial/restart file is read in from
**inFile:** |br| Name of the input file for coordinate system and initial or restart conditions
**outPath:** |br| Path where output files are to be written
**outFileBase:** |br| Base name of the output file series as in (outFileBase).element-in-series
**frqOutput:** |br| Frequency (in timesteps) at which to produce output |br| Should be an even multiple of NtBatch
**ioOutputMode:** |br| 0: N-to-1 gather and write to a netcdf file |br| 1: N-to-N writes of FastEddy binary files
**towerPath** |br| Path where output profile files are to be written |br| *C-M if towerIOSelector==1*
**towerSpecsFile** |br| The path and filename to a Tower specification file |br| *C-M if towerIOSelector==1*
